steps.title: Convert the units
steps.content:
Convert kilometers to meters and hours to seconds:
$$72\text{ kilometers}=72{,}000\text{ meters}$$
$$1\text{ hour}=3{,}600\text{ seconds}$$

steps.title: Find meters per second
steps.content: Divide meters by seconds: $$\frac{72{,}000}{3{,}600}=20$$ The equivalent speed is $20$ meters per second. The answer is A.
